credits: Dark Nebula sector was designed by Marc W. Miller and appears in Atlas of the Imperium (GDW, 1984). It was refined by by Peter G. Celella and James Holden and appears in The MegaTraveller Alien, Volume 2: Solomani & Aslan (DGP, 1991).
